title: French Healthcare Software Provider, Maincare, Selects HPE GreenLake to Accelerate Deployment of Secure Health Cloud Services
text: PARIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that leading French healthcare software provider, Maincare has adopted the HPE GreenLake to power its highly secure cloud offering, Maincare Hosting Services. Maincare will use HPE Synergy, HPE's software-defined composable infrastructure, in an as-a-service model, to provide an easy-to-manage platform that responds to growing business demands for healthcare-certified, secure cloud services. title: du Selects Hewlett Packard Enterprise for Digital Transformation Journey to 5G
text: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that du, from Emirates Integrated Telecommunications Company (EITC), is deploying HPE's end-to-end service orchestration software to accelerate their digital transformation and drive new revenue streams from their growing 5G network. du is migrating from a legacy system to a next-generation Operations Support System (OSS) to support new services and enhance its customers' experience. title: Hewlett Packard's (HPE) Cray Ex to Build KAUST's Shaheen III
text: Hewlett Packard (HPE) collaborates with Saudi Arabia's King Abdullah University of Science and Technology to build the next-generation supercomputer of the Middle East, Shaheen III.

title: KAUST Selects HPE to Build the Middle East's Most Powerful Supercomputer
text: RIYADH, Saudi Arabia--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that King Abdullah University of Science and Technology (KAUST) selected HPE to build its next-generation supercomputer, Shaheen III, to deliver state-of-the-art supercomputing and artificial intelligence (AI) capabilities for advancing research in fields such as food, water, energy and the environment. title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise names Regina E. Dugan, technology leader and former DARPA director, to Board of Directors
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise names Regina E. Dugan, technology leader and former DARPA director, to its Board of Directors .

title: Educational Institutions Driving Rapid Adoption of Aruba Wi-Fi 6E for 21st Century Digital Classrooms and Smart Facilities
text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Educational institutions are upgrading their network infrastructures with Aruba Wi-Fi 6E to enable next generation digital classrooms and campuses.
